implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Near-perfect implementation. The three-line footer satisfies both acceptance criteria exactly — correct placement, dynamic year via `new Date().getFullYear()`, and the '© BrewBoard' text. Change is surgically small, Tailwind classes are idiomatic for the project, and no tests/docs/refactors were added. The only marginal note is that `<footer>` is nested inside `<main>`, which is semantically valid (it becomes a section footer rather than a landmark footer) but is a common point of debate for site-wide footers. Given the spec's explicit 'one line, no complex styling needed' guidance and the single-page structure, this is acceptable rather than wrong.

requirements.notes: Both acceptance criteria met: footer is at the bottom of the page and contains '© {currentYear} BrewBoard'. No tests, no docs, no refactors — all out-of-scope items correctly avoided.

correctness.notes: JSX is valid, `new Date().getFullYear()` is the correct dynamic year pattern, `©` renders correctly in JSX. Footer inside `<main>` is technically valid HTML5 but makes it a section footer rather than a landmark footer — minor semantic ambiguity, not a bug.

minimality.notes: Exactly 3 lines added to page.tsx. Log file is a required workflow artifact. No surrounding code touched.

code_quality.notes: Tailwind classes (`mt-16 border-t pt-8 text-stone-500 text-sm`) are consistent with the project's styling conventions. Clean and readable. `text-stone-500` is an appropriate muted tone for footer text.

risk.notes: No existing code modified, only appended. No accessibility regressions — `<footer>` carries its own implicit ARIA role. The year will update correctly on each render. Negligible risk.
